attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.FREIGHT_CODE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.FREIGHT_CODE_TL, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.LANGUAGE_CODE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.SOURCE_LANG, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.DISABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.PARTY_ID, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL,
 (
 select FREIGHT_CODE ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL
 minus
 select FREIGHT_CODE ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.FREIGHT_CODE = STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.FREIGHT_CODE and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.LANGUAGE_CODE=STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.LANGUAGE_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_ORG_FREIGHT_TL)
